positioning.name: Run the Play
positioning.tagline: Advertising Made Simple for the Culture
positioning.premise: Podcast advertising is the most trusted ad format left. The money chases the top 100 shows, priced like Super Bowl inventory — while mid-tier culture shows deliver the same trust engine at a fraction of the price. Nobody is planning against that. Run the Play is the plan.
positioning.closer: Same trust engine. A fraction of the price. That's the play.

whyItWorks.label: ad recall on host-read ads
whyItWorks.detail: versus 24–31% for programmatic insertions — a host-read is a trust transfer, not an interruption

whyItWorks.label: higher brand recall for host-read spots
whyItWorks.detail: host-read ads outperform pre-produced ads on brand recall

whyItWorks.label: skip rate on mid-roll podcast ads
whyItWorks.detail: listeners chose the show and stay through the ad — compare that to a YouTube pre-roll

whyItWorks.label: Americans listen to podcasts monthly
whyItWorks.detail: about 55% of everyone 12 and up — locked-in, weekly audiences

growth.label: US podcast ad revenue in 2025
growth.detail: up ~18% year over year; from $105M in 2015 to nearly $3B in a decade
growth.source: IAB / PwC US Podcast Advertising Revenue Study

growth.label: of US podcast creators now produce video
growth.detail: every placement works twice: in the feed and in the clip economy on TikTok, Reels, Shorts, and YouTube

arbitrage.headline: The money chases the top 100. The value sits below them.

outliers.label: Top 100 shows
outliers.note: Great shows — priced like Super Bowl inventory. For most brands the math stops working.

midTier.label: Mid-tier culture shows
midTier.note: Same host-read trust mechanics, often tighter audience fit: 80,000 die-hard weekly listeners in your exact demo beat 3M casuals who will never buy.

arbitrage.conclusion: The performance gap between host-read and programmatic is documented. The price gap between the outliers and the mid-tier is documented. The arbitrage lives in between — and nobody is planning against it.
arbitrage.source: Host-read CPM ranges per industry benchmarks (Ad Results Media, IAB)

whatWeDo: Put the culture shows on the map — real public performance data, the receipts on display.
Make the case in the culture's own voice — every chart and clip is proof the channel works.
Turn discovery into a plan — budget in, slate of shows and placements out. No agency retainer, no six-figure minimum.
sources: IAB / PwC US Podcast Advertising Revenue Study (2025, 2026 forecast)

story.heroHeadline: Build a national campaign through independent culture media.
story.heroSub: Reach trusted audiences across independent podcasts, clips, and creator media — without a major agency budget.
story.problem: Big business buys culture in bulk. Small players are forced to negotiate one by one.
story.power: Big business buys culture in bulk. Run the Play gives the people inside the culture the power to aggregate too.
story.journey: One audience may look small. Combined, they move culture.
story.publicLine: Independent voices. Combined reach. National opportunity.
story.resolution: Small brands move nationally without pretending to be major corporations, and independent media competes without giving up ownership.
